# Author the v13.1.0 release-notes document

## Context

Narrow authoring leaf of #14475 (v13.1 release cut), split per close-target discipline: the notes-document PR must not `Resolves` the cut ticket while its prepare-validation, operator publish-handoff, and #14327-notify ACs remain open ticket-side. This leaf is fully delivered by the document PR; #14475 stays the coordination anchor.

Live latest-open sweep: checked latest 8 open issues at 2026-07-02T14:42:00Z (full latest-20 at 14:27:19Z) — no equivalent authoring ticket. A2A: no competing claim; the parent lane is mine (self-assigned, lane-claim broadcast d8e3fc3d).

## The Problem / The Fix

`publish.mjs:83` requires a hand-authored `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` at the flat directory root before the cut can execute (it parses title+body for `gh release create`; the ReleaseNotesSyncer then re-mirrors the published release into `chunk-N/` with sync frontmatter — the flat file is the authoring surface, the chunks are mirrors). Author the document to the narrative bar: TL;DR → the window stat (663 PRs / 748 issues / 8 epics in 20 days) → hero (the four-layer immune system + #14046 single-shot + #14165 24-cycle soak gates) → War Story (#13999: ~60% silent vector loss, green health checks, backup-failure discovery → detect/diagnose/heal/prevent) → window highlights → continuity. Every external claim sourced to tickets/commits verified this session.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `resources/content/release-notes/v13.1.0.md` merged on dev at the flat root (not chunk-N)
- [ ] Narrative-bar structure present (TL;DR / stat / hero / War Story / grouped shape / continuity) with claims sourced to ticket numbers
- [ ] The sync-guard bypass (`--no-verify` per publish-pipeline precedent: publish.mjs's own internal commit + v13.0.0 flat-file PR lineage #12697/#13276) documented in the PR's Deltas
- [ ] Cross-family review before merge (also #14475 AC-3)

## Out of Scope

Everything else on #14475: scope re-enumeration at cut boundary, `prepare.mjs` validation, the operator publish handoff, #14327 notification.

## Related

Related: #14475 (parent cut ticket), #14039 (the release epic), #13999 (War-Story source)
